title: ageratina ozolotepecana
intro: Ageratina ozolotepecana, also known as Oaxaca mountain mint, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ageratina ozolotepecana include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and stomach cramps, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. Ageratina ozolotepecana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
